purpose: Force skills heartbeats to produce reviewed, installable, discoverable skill value instead of unbounded catalog/status churn.
selection_rule: Operators must consume the highest-priority ready ticket allowed by gates.md. Safety and discovery restoration outrank routine metadata cleanup.
definition_of_done: A done ticket must restore discovery, review a source/skill, normalize a skill, remove a risk blocker, repair catalog parity, publish/verify an installable surface, or kill unsafe/generic material. Status-only updates are not done.

tickets.mission: Restore deterministic discovery handoff production for public skill/source scouting or document the exact connector/runtime blocker and create the smallest repair path.
tickets.required_connector: GitHub/web only; no copying third-party content
acceptance_tests: explains why latest discovery handoff is absent
creates or queues a deterministic repair path
does not mirror third-party content
updates board and daily state with next source-review action

acceptance_result.evidence: reports/discovery/2026-07-08-discovery-handoff-repair.md documents that latest.json is absent while the producer workflow/scripts exist, queues manual fallback, and preserves risk/package gates.

tickets.supervisor_gate: Supervisor should keep publication/readiness blocked until deterministic discovery or a bounded manual fallback is working.
tickets.kill_condition: If connector cannot inspect workflow/action state, create a precise local-agent/CI repair ticket instead of pretending discovery is active.

tickets.mission: Run the connector-safe metadata-only manual discovery fallback because the canonical GitHub Action handoff is absent from the default branch.
acceptance_tests: records at least three real public candidate sources or exact searches/blockers
classifies each candidate as review_next, watch, or skip_or_low_priority
does not clone, execute, copy, import, normalize, publish, or package candidate content
creates review-next, watch, skip, risk, or source-review queue state
tickets.supervisor_gate: Manual fallback output is discovery metadata only and cannot be treated as normalized skill content.
tickets.kill_condition: If fewer than three real candidates can be found after explicit public searches, record exact searches and blockers; do not invent candidates.

tickets.mission: Inspect GitHub Actions run/log state or execute the discovery scripts in a safe local/CI context to prove whether the producer fails in discovery, review, handoff write, commit, pull/rebase, or push.
tickets.required_connector: GitHub Actions logs or safe local/CI execution surface
acceptance_tests: identifies exact producer failure stage or verifies fresh handoff creation
does not clone or execute third-party candidate code
updates the producer workflow or scripts only if the failure is directly proven
keeps manual fallback available while the producer is unverified
tickets.supervisor_gate: Promote only when Action logs or safe local/CI execution are inspectable.
tickets.kill_condition: If the producer cannot be inspected by available tools, keep blocked and rely on manual metadata fallback.

tickets.mission: Review and safely wrap or redact the MCP tool-poisoning/SSRF skill so package-facing surfaces preserve defensive audit value without default executable probing detail.
acceptance_tests: classifies risk level and requires_review
removes default executable SSRF/probing detail if unsafe
preserves defensive audit framing
creates catalog-refresh ticket if package-facing metadata changed
tickets.supervisor_gate: Routine metadata backlog must remain blocked while this high-risk ticket is open.
tickets.kill_condition: If the skill cannot be made safe as a defensive wrapper, remove from installable catalog or mark non-publishable.

tickets.mission: Regenerate or verify catalog/install-manifest parity after risk or metadata changes.
acceptance_tests: catalog reflects changed risk/domain/review metadata
install manifest is coherent
no npm publish attempted
board next ticket is updated
tickets.supervisor_gate: Publication remains blocked until catalog parity is verified.
tickets.kill_condition: Block if generated surfaces cannot be updated via connector and require local script execution.

tickets.mission: Process one bounded batch from the uncategorized/unspecified-risk backlog, stopping immediately on any high-risk executable, credential, offensive, account, or external-mutation surface.
acceptance_tests: processes a bounded batch, not the entire catalog
adds domain/risk/requires_review/source status when justified
stops and creates risk ticket on unsafe material
creates catalog refresh ticket after metadata changes
tickets.supervisor_gate: Backlog cleanup is lower priority than discovery restoration and high-risk review.
tickets.kill_condition: Stop if the batch becomes generic metadata churn with no package-facing value.
